responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix automatic owner sign-in on cold launch so the owner login screen appears every time the app starts, then build and ship a new APK proving it

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved — no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project, no replacement shell
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app` (NOT `com.rork.ivxholdings` — that Kotlin app is frozen)
- Use `bun x` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Never ask user for credentials — find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports — redact all tokens/keys
- Owner email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- APK download links use `litterbox.catbox.moe` with 24h expiry
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID are NOT set in sandbox — EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Diagnostic banner must be hidden by default in ALL runtimes, available only through Owner Control → Diagnostics
- Owner AI send button must be disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER` auth state
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture — modify the EXISTING `lib/auth-context.tsx` only
- User explicitly said: "Stop comparing against example files" — do not audit pasted snippets, audit only real files
- User demanded: exact file, line number, function name, root cause, code change, commit SHA, and APK proving owner login screen appears after every cold launch

## Progress
### Done
- Build 15 APK completed, verified, and uploaded:
  - package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 15, versionName 1.4.3, 84MB
  - Embedded: API `api.ivxholding.com`, environment `production`, runtime `standalone`, Git SHA `d588155`
  - Uploaded to `https://litter.catbox.moe/7s803c.apk` (24h expiry)
  - Copied to `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build15.apk`
  - `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` updated with build 15 details
  - Build plan `.rork/plans/build-one-unified-ivx-holdings-android-a_1784077962623.plan.md` tasks updated
- Build 15 fixes (diagnostics + runtime detection):
  - `app/ivx/chat.tsx`: `diagnosticsBannerVisible` defaults `false`, `visible` prop bound to state
  - `lib/runtime-environment.ts`: bare-workflow release APK classified as `standalone`/`production`
  - `constants/build-info.ts`: `readEnvironment()` checks `__DEV__` first, returns `production` for release
- User pasted 3 code snippets (Supabase client with `persistSession:false`, `OwnerAuthProvider` class, root layout with `Stack.Protected`) — NONE exist in codebase, verified by grep for all unique strings
- Comprehensive audit of existing auth architecture completed — found 4 root causes of automatic owner sign-in:
  1. **`initAuth()` lines 1482–1505**: calls `supabase.auth.getSession()` → returns persisted session from AsyncStorage → passes to `handleSession()` → sets `isAuthenticated: true` without credentials
  2. **`initAuth()` lines 1508–1534**: fallback `loadStoredAuth()` from SecureStore + `refreshSession()` → also calls `handleSession()` → auto-login
  3. **`onAuthStateChange` lines 1570–1580**: only `INITIAL_SESSION` filtered; `TOKEN_REFRESHED` events accepted → calls `handleSession()` → auto-login
  4. **`manualOwnerLoginRef` lines 1876–1878**: only set `true` for owner emails via `isOwnerAdminEmail()` check — gate was too narrow
- Fix applied to `lib/auth-context.tsx` (5 edits):
  - `initAuth()` rewritten: now calls `supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' })` on cold launch and sets `manualOwnerLoginRef.current = false` — removed entire `getSession()`/`handleSession()`/`loadStoredAuth()`/`refreshSession()` restore block
  - `onAuthStateChange` handler: added `if (!manualOwnerLoginRef.current) { return; }` guard before accepting any session event
  - `login()` line ~1875: `manualOwnerLoginRef.current = true` set unconditionally (removed `isOwnerAdminEmail` check)
  - `login()` repair retry path: `manualOwnerLoginRef.current = true` set unconditionally
  - `verify2FA()` line ~1984: `manualOwnerLoginRef.current = true` set unconditionally
  - `loginOwnerPasswordless()` already had unconditional `manualOwnerLoginRef.current = true` at line 1604
- TypeScript passes clean (0 errors) after all fixes
- `app.config.ts` bumped to versionCode 16, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_16_NO_AUTO_LOGIN`, sourceCommitSha `e3149d5c995d8e3d95a205d9d4ce4ae65a0958f3`, buildTimestamp `2026-07-15T04:30:00.000000+00:00`
- Core test suite (build 15): 378 pass, 0 fail, 0 error for unit/integration; 428 pass total with 1 Playwright e2e fail
- Watchman disabled (`chmod -x /usr/local/bin/watchman`) — Metro uses polling fallback

### In Progress
- Need to run `expo prebuild --platform android --clean` then `gradlew :app:assembleRelease` for build 16
- Need to verify APK (package, versionCode 16, embedded identity), upload, and update `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json`

### Blocked
- EXPO_TOKEN not set — EAS cloud build unavailable
- EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID not set — defaults to placeholder
- GitHub token expired (HTTP 401) — cannot push to GitHub repo, Render backend stuck at `0b37191f`
- Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox — user must test installed APK on physical device

## Key Decisions
- Cold launch now signs out any persisted Supabase session via `signOut({ scope: 'local' })` — owner MUST enter credentials every time
- `manualOwnerLoginRef` is the single gate: `onAuthStateChange` ignores all session events unless `manualOwnerLoginRef.current === true`, which is only set inside `login()`, `loginOwnerPasswordless()`, and `verify2FA()` before the Supabase sign-in call
- Removed the `isOwnerAdminEmail()` gate on `manualOwnerLoginRef` — now set unconditionally for all manual logins
- No new providers or architecture — all changes are surgical edits to existing `lib/auth-context.tsx`
- Diagnostic banner default `false` in ALL runtimes — only reopenable via Owner Control → Diagnostics
- Bare-workflow release APK is `standalone`/`production` when `__DEV__` is false
- Building APK locally via `expo prebuild` + `gradlew assembleRelease` since EAS cloud is blocked
- Build info sourced from `Constants.expoConfig.extra` instead of `EXPO_PUBLIC_*` env vars

## Next Steps
1. Run `expo prebuild --platform android --clean` for build 16
2. Run `gradlew :app:assembleRelease` to build APK
3. Verify APK: package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 16, Git SHA `e3149d5`, API env `api.ivxholding.com`
4. Copy APK to `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build16.apk`
5. Upload APK to litterbox for direct download link
6. Update `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` with build 16 details
7. User must test build 16 on real device — verify owner login screen appears after cold launch, no automatic sign-in

## Critical Context
- Git HEAD SHA: `e3149d5c995d8e3d95a205d9d4ce4ae65a0958f3` (`e3149d5`)
- Previous build 15 APK at `https://litter.catbox.moe/7s803c.apk` (24h expiry from ~03:25 UTC)
- Previous build 14 APK at `https://litter.catbox.moe/3cuemj.apk` (likely expired)
- Watchman at `/usr/local/bin/watchman` has execute permission removed — all Metro/Gradle builds work without hanging
- Metro bundler works with Watchman disabled — uses polling fallback
- Gradle 8.14.3, JDK 17.0.13, Kotlin 2.0.21, Android SDK 35/36 build-tools available
- `aapt2` at `/home/user/.gradle/caches/8.14.1/transforms/.../aapt2` for APK verification
- Supabase production URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (project ref `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb`)
- Owner userId: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`, role=owner, kycStatus=approved
- Render service: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`, commit `0b37191f`, 77 routes, deployment `dep-d9bed5j7uimc73a9t8g`
- `expo/metro.config.js` has `config.watcher.useWatchman = false`
- Supabase client `lib/supabase.ts` has `persistSession: true` with AsyncStorage adapter (line 208-210) — the cold-launch `signOut` in `initAuth` is what prevents auto-login now, NOT disabling persistence
- `lib/owner-session-resilience.ts` exports `storeOwnerResilientSession` and `restoreOwnerResilientSession` — `restoreOwnerResilientSession` is NOT called anywhere (all 3 call sites have `OWNER AUTO-LOGIN BLOCK: restoreOwnerResilientSession() removed` comments)

## Relevant Files
- `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: Core auth context — `initAuth()` now signs out on cold launch (line 1482), `onAuthStateChange` gated by `manualOwnerLoginRef` (line 1517), `manualOwnerLoginRef` set unconditionally in `login()`/`loginOwnerPasswordless()`/`verify2FA()`
- `expo/app.config.ts`: Expo config — versionCode 16, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_16_NO_AUTO_LOGIN`, sourceCommitSha `e3149d5...`
- `expo/lib/supabase.ts`: Supabase singleton — `persistSession: true`, AsyncStorage adapter, `autoRefreshToken: true`, `flowType: 'pkce'`
- `expo/constants/build-info.ts`: Reads build identity from `Constants.expoConfig.extra`
- `expo/components/IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics.tsx`: Accepts `visible`/`onClose` props, Close button
- `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`: `diagnosticsBannerVisible` defaults `false`, auth state machine with 6 states, send disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER`
- `expo/lib/runtime-environment.ts`: Bare-workflow detection — `isStandalone` true when `isBare && !devFlag`
- `expo/lib/owner-session-resilience.ts`: SecureStore-based session backup — `restoreOwnerResilientSession` not called anywhere
- `expo/lib/auth-store.ts`: In-memory auth credentials + SecureStore persistence for userId/role
- `expo/lib/admin-access-lock.ts`: Owner email check via `isOwnerAdminEmail()`, production owner `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json`: Updated with build 15 details (needs update for build 16)
- `.rork/plans/build-one-unified-ivx-holdings-android-a_1784077962623.plan.md`: Project plan tracking all tasks
